findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'process components: evaluation criteria' (4x).

findings.description: Flow Regime Changes bar chart (Stream Condition Middle Deep River, Node 280, June-November) is missing from the HTML. The complex bar chart showing QAA percentages across Unimpaired, 2003, 2030, and 2050 Demands is not rendered.
findings.evidence: PDF page 15 shows a detailed bar chart with 9 legend categories (< 10% of QAA through >200% of QAA) across four demand scenarios. The HTML only shows the text headings 'Flow Regime Changes', 'Stream Condition Middle Deep River (Node 280)', and 'June - November' but no chart image appears in this or adjacent HTML chunks.

findings.description: Water Supply Deficits table appears twice in the HTML: once as a slide image and once as a separate HTML table, creating a reading-order duplication.
findings.evidence: PDF page 16 shows Table 4-3 once. The HTML renders both the slide image containing the table AND a fully formatted HTML table with the same data (Orange-Alamance, Hillsborough, Piedmont Minerals, Raleigh, Durham, SGWASA rows), causing the reader to encounter the same information twice.

findings.description: Model Development Tasks content appears duplicated in the HTML as both slide images showing the task text and HTML text rendering of the same tasks.
findings.evidence: PDF page 20 lists Tasks 1-5 once. The HTML shows partial slide images with 'Task 2 - OASIS Application Development', 'Task 3 - Organize and Conduct Meetings', 'Task 4 – Deliverables' visible as images AND also renders the same tasks as HTML text, creating duplicated reading flow.

findings.description: Table 4-3 (Water Supply Demand & Deficits) is rendered both as an embedded image AND as a separate HTML <table>. The PDF contains this only once (as a single table on page 16).
findings.evidence:
HTML contains: immediately followed by ...
Table 4-3: Water Supply Demand & Deficits...
. The PDF has this content only once.

findings.description: The Venn diagram from PDF page 19 (Project Organization) showing the three overlapping circles for Data Collection (HDR), Model Development (HydroLogics), and Data/Model Evaluation & Plan Development (NCDWR) is missing from the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF page 19 has a three-circle Venn diagram illustrating the relationship between HDR, HydroLogics, and NCDWR. The HTML section for 'Project Organization' contains only a bulleted list with no tag.

findings.description: Task 2 and Task 4 text from page 20 appear both as embedded images (with alt text 'Highlighted text: Task 2 - OASIS Application Development' and 'Highlighted text: Task 4 - Deliverables') AND as inline HTML text within the same list items. The PDF shows these once each as styled text.
findings.evidence:
HTML: '
  • Task 2 - OASIS Application Development
    • ' — the same content rendered twice per item.

findings.description: The URL 'https://deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/water-resources/' on the closing slide (page 23) is rendered as plain text in the HTML without an <a href> wrapper.
findings.evidence:
HTML: '

Division of Water Resources
https://deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/water-resources/
919-707-9000
???

' — the URL is not wrapped in an anchor tag.
